free_text: The Penfold-Leiss variable bin method for cross
section unfolding from the yield curve.
Above the  two-neutron  reaction threshold,  17.5 MeV
for isotope Ag-17 and 16.5 MeV for  isotope  Ag-109,
the experimental  reaction  cross   sectionss   were
corrected  for  the  neutron multiplicity assuming a
statistical decay of the GDR states.
